subject: fix(theme): compute meta colors from actual DaisyUI oklch values
body:
Meta theme-color hex values were estimated by hand, not calculated from
the DaisyUI theme CSS. Wrote oklch→sRGB converter and derived correct
values from node_modules/daisyui/themes.css.

Light themes use primary color, dark themes use base-100:
- vivid: #45b5e6→#45aeee (cmyk primary), #0f1729→#0f172a (night base-100)
- classic: #808080→#0d0d0d (lofi primary), #000000 unchanged (black base-100)
- nature: #66CC8A→#66cc8a (case only), #1a2e1a→#1b1717 (forest base-100)

Tags: theme, daisyui, pwa, fix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
